items.title: broken parser\nexport const z = 3;
items.description: P0 priority signals an active regression. 'Broken parser' most likely refers to a defect in the autonomous loop's proposal-extraction path; fixing it unblocks reliable backlog ingestion for every future cycle. Low cost and high systemic impact make this the clear lead item.

items.title: add a one-sentence description of the v6.4 autonomous development loop to this README. Briefly explain that `npm run autonomous:cycle` runs a supervised end-to-end cycle (plan → execute → test → commit → PR) using the logged-in Claude Code session. Keep it under 200 characters.
items.description: Fully self-contained documentation task with an exact spec provided inline (under 200 characters, references npm run autonomous:cycle). Improves loop discoverability for agents and humans alike at near-zero cost and zero regression risk.
